header: We bring shadcn-quality UI to TYPO3 editors
description: Desiderio is built in the open by webconsulting studio in Vienna: 255 ready-made content elements, 49 Fluid 5 components, and 15 shadcn theme presets for TYPO3 14 — free forever under GPL-2.0. And when you want the people who built every single element to install, host, or adapt your site, we are one email away.
